rows.label: qev087302_MSG0001
rows.name:
This seems to be the most likely
place the BLADEs are being held.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087302_MSG0004
rows.name:
The rest of you use the time to
get in there and find the others.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087302_MSG0006
rows.name:
There's a chance they're being
held elsewhere— we don't want
to cause a scene here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087302_MSG0008
rows.name: What's going on? This isn't like you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087302_MSG0011
rows.name:
Are you still fixated on the Avalancher
team that died protecting you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087302_MSG0012
rows.name: Overeager? Am I really acting that way?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087302_MSG0013
rows.name:
I see... I hadn't noticed, but
if you say so, I'm sure there
must be something to it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087302_MSG0014
rows.name:
My apologies, ma'am.
I await your orders.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087302_MSG0015
rows.name:
Stealth takes priority. We
can't afford to be seen here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087302_MSG0016
rows.name:
If we're discovered, it only puts the
captured BLADEs in greater danger.[ST:wait ]
